'''βàöf-ng-z-zh''' ('''kafangzezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaguepost|vaguepost]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaguepost|vaguepost]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöf-ng-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafangzezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifangzezhoko|thifangzezhoko]] || [[word:jifangzezhoko|jifangzezhoko]] || [[word:shifangzezhoko|shifangzezhoko]] || [[word:kifangzezhoko|kifangzezhoko]]
|-
